Thanks for the PR! For anything non-trivial, please open an issue first so we
can agree on the shape before you spend time on it.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behavior change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / SECURITY.md) if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry if the change is user-facing
- [ ] Kept the runtime dependency surface unchanged (or explained why a new one is needed)
